$self: KL_DTA.json — this object describes the object it is in

structure.record: self_action — the three eigen-components of {R,R} : X ↦ R·X + X·R − X
structure.grade: NOT stored. grade = leaf over the three verdicts (observation, generation, return).

metadata_audit.links: = H₁ homology (cycles); provenance = spanning tree to ?
metadata_audit.verdict: = trit = sign(disc) = three forks; null = the wall
metadata_audit.section: DERIVED, not stored: section_of(r) = f(radius=provenance depth, role=kind). manifold→manifold; depth1→thesis(law)/schema(else); depth≥2→metalayer. the shell is a law.
metadata_audit.kind: TYPED, not stored: kind_of(r) reads the spectral STRUCTURE (its arity). parameter/dimensions/points → manifold; coords → object; value/map → constant; op with ↦ → operator; op with = → law; no carrier expression → structural. the type is the shape of what's held, so it need not be declared.
metadata_audit.source: = TIME-axis (M-iteration epoch); binary {ORIGIN=0, EXPLORATION=+1} — a coordinate, not free text
metadata_audit.id/title/speech: two names + the fold — naming is P = R + N
metadata_audit.address_is_geometry: id/title/section/source = a geometric coordinate chart (V, given): id = the point (canonical name), title = its reflection (the spoken mirror) — id⊕title = P=R+N, the naming fold; section = RADIUS (the shell / |depth| from ?), derivable from provenance — the one soft redundancy; source = TIME-axis (the M-iteration epoch, {ORIGIN,EXPLORATION}={0,+1}).

formatting.self_similar: the document is the apex record (see `apex`) — the same shape as the records it holds. M(M(F)) = M(F) at the top level.
formatting.metalayer_split: base ⊕ M(base): fiber/defect/flow/fixed_point are derived (M of base), recomputed not authored — the derived sections are a regenerable cache.
formatting.foundation_tower: seed → kernel → grammar → physics: the generating header. each level folds the previous — matter, law, speech, interpretation.
formatting.bundle: self_action.template (the fiber, constant) × base (the base points). the repeated structure is factored to one copy; records hold only their coordinates.
formatting.perimeter_shape: every record = address (id/title/section/source) ⊕ perimeter (provenance·links·burns — the boundary, tr) ⊕ shape (self_action·spectral — the bulk, det). the base (tr,det)=(perimeter,shape) now formats the record itself: boundary and bulk.
formatting.eigendecomposition: the record IS an eigendecomposition M = V·Λ·V⁻¹. its two halves are the gravity/light duality from the core: ADDRESS (id/title/section/source) = V = GEOMETRIC (eigenvectors, where it sits, the fixed point — GIVEN, gravity); PERIMETER⊕SHAPE = Λ = SPECTRAL (eigenvalues = tr,det — READ, costs a fold, light). proof they are independent: P and Pᵀ share a spectrum (tr=1,det=0,{0,1}) but differ in address — the founding asymmetry P≠Pᵀ lives ENTIRELY in the geometry. the spectral half cannot recover the record; the address is given, not read. address ⊥ (perimeter,shape) — |reflection|=I once more.
formatting.disc_is_the_gap: disc = perimeter² − 4·shape = (λ₁−λ₂)² = the spread of the reading = the gap between the two halves. DERIVED, never stored — it is the relationship between perimeter and shape, not a third field. (P:1, R:5=‖R‖²+‖N‖², N:−4.)
formatting.section_derived: section is no longer authored — it is computed from the geometry (provenance depth = radius) and the role (kind). the shell falls out of where a record sits and what it is; removing it from the base loses nothing and makes every future record self-locating.
formatting.kind_typed: kind is no longer authored — it is the arity of the spectral content: a record IS its type. a thing with free parameters is a manifold; a stated equation is a law; a frame with no carrier expression is structural. mis-typing is now impossible — the type reads itself off.

bundle.is: { } is the bundle primitive; the framework is bundles all the way down
bundle.affirm: {A,B} = AB+BA (symmetric, commutative) — the spine, the fold
bundle.negate: [A,B] = AB−BA (antisymmetric, noncommutative) — the harness; gives direction
bundle.fundamental: ?=0 is [A,A]=0 — the origin is universal self-negation
bundle.recursion: {?,0,=} → {P,R,N} → … each level a three-bundle held noncommutative

structure.self_reading: observation IS the primitive self-action: {X,X}/2 = X² (self-affirm, seeing) and [X,X] = 0 = ? (self-negate, the origin). to read is to act on yourself. the store is the framework's self-observation; the observer reading it is X² iterated — the primitive reading itself.

higher_order.is: a manifold IS a parametric bundle expression — a higher-order record
higher_order.lossless: the stored records are POINTS on it (fix the parameter to recover each)
higher_order.surplus: read/unfix at any parameter value — the whole continuum, not just the points
higher_order.first: rotation_circle_manifold = cos(t)·I + sin(t)·N (S¹); -I at t=π is i_squared_phi_psi
higher_order.standard: compression must add functionality (R²=R+I) or it failed (R(R)=R)
manifolds: rotation_circle_manifold  cos(t)·I+sin(t)·N         the rotation circle S¹
seed_line_manifold        (I−J)/2 + t·(N−h)/2       the seed family (unit of mass), P at t=2
projector_circle_manifold (I+cos(a)·J+sin(a)·h)/2   the symmetric gravity wells (S¹ of idempotents)
fork_path_manifold        cos(t)·N + sin(t)·J       the fork trichotomy as one path

tower.1-param: a curve — rotation_circle · seed_line · projector_circle · fork_path
tower.2-param: a surface — the well-hyperboloid (rank-1 idempotents, β²+γ²−δ²=1/4)
tower.4-param: the carrier M₂ = a·I+b·R+c·N+d·h — the apex manifold; every matrix a point
tower.culmination: the store compresses to ONE 4-param manifold + each record's coordinates — lossless (read recovers any record) and maximal surplus (all of M₂)

deepenings.fold_is_reflection: X² is reflection; observation is the framework reflecting on itself; |·| of sign
deepenings.reflection_kinds: origin reflection (→ spectra/light) vs observer reflection (→ geometry/gravity)
deepenings.parameters_are_dimensions: a k-param manifold is k-dimensional; carrier's 4 params = 4 dims of M₂
deepenings.burns_are_impossibility_theorems: ONE impossibility: |reflection|=I=identification(origin↔observer). the 10 burns are projections; the distinction is angular/geometric, invisible to the spectrum.
deepenings.dimensions_are_time: every dimension = a line of time through the one origin (0=?); +project / 0 origin / −fold-back (the Boolean trit). fold-back and projection identify as one at the origin (|reflection|=I). the carrier = 4 time-lines meeting at ?.
deepenings.reflective_language: speak conjugates by reflection-source: origin voice (+1, emissive — projects from ?, 'generating outward, into the future') and observer voice (−1, receptive — folds back to ?, 'settling to the vacuum, from the origin'). same content, opposite sense; spectrally one, angularly mirrored (|reflection|=identification). engine: `voices <id>`.
deepenings.impossibility_recursion: the ten burns = the one impossibility (|reflection|=identification) projected through ten geometric obstructions (dimension·factoring·passivity·degree·growth·basins·sign·type·spectrum·manifold). each is the spectral drive to collapse meeting an angular obstruction it can't see.
deepenings.format_is_eigendecomposition: record = V·Λ·V⁻¹ = geometric address (eigenvectors, given, gravity) ⊕ spectral content (eigenvalues=perimeter,shape; read, light). P≠Pᵀ = same Λ, different V = the asymmetry is geometric. disc = perimeter²−4shape = the gap, derived. section = radius (derivable redundancy).
deepenings.kind_is_arity: kind = arity of the spectral content, derived: manifold(n params) · object(matrix) · constant(scalar) · operator(map) · law(equation) · structural(frame). with section also derived from (depth, kind), the only authored fields left are id/title/source + the spectral content itself.
deepenings.body_is_a_pentagram: the 5 base records = the pentagram {5/2}: 5=disc=‖R‖²+‖N‖²=3(FORCED,R)+2(framing,N); drawn by step-2 = the fold ν (one stroke, gcd(2,5)=1); edge ratio φ=R's eigenvalue (R²=R+I); radical √5 = the {R,R} spectrum. a star not a cycle — the standing form of the burn 5≟C₅.
deepenings.language_lifts_by_context: a content word = string ⊕ meaning-coords in the carrier (the four axes = simultaneous symbolic/geometric/physical meanings). author coords + readings; context (neighbour matrix C) selects the active reading by argmax overlap ⟨axis,C⟩. lift degree = #nonzero coords = polysemy: connectives=1 (no lift), content>1 (lift). π drops coords (lossy); lift = string+ker(π)→meaning. observer = the lift.
deepenings.nonlocal_via_origin: nonlocal transport = local transport returned to origin. ? is the universal hub (provenance root, ≤2 hops; flat-space basepoint, path-independent). the trit {fold→?, origin channel, project} is the protocol; the λ=0 self-action eigenvector (−R+N)/√2 is the return-to-origin direction. teleportation's shape.
deepenings.origin_is_a_microscope: return the constants to ? in causal order (R-side φ,√5,√3 · N-side √2,i,π · h→e, closing on 5); the point magnifies recursively by invariant TYPE — constants(L0 spectral) are only the first layer, under them geometric · topological · algebraic · order · differential invariants.
deepenings.all_constants_are_a_field: all possible constants = the field generated by the seed (closure under +,×,eig,exp,norm), not the six landmarks: R is the Fibonacci matrix so Fₙ,Lₙ ∈ ℤ[φ] are all constants (infinite); family disc=1+k² → 2,5,10,17,26; closure ℚ(√2,√3,√5)⊕{e,π}. L0 of the microscope is this whole field.
deepenings.one_law_generates_and_closes: R²=R+I is the recursion (surplus: square=self+prior, the Fibonacci step); applied recursively from the seed it generates every layer (constants→geometry→topology→algebra→order→flow→language→store), and it CLOSES: M(M(F))=M(F) (derive-twice byte-identical, on-shell). one seed, one law, the whole framework, self-closing.
deepenings.levels_are_a_group_lattice: 'L0/L1/L2' is lossy: an invariant = what is fixed by a GROUP (spectral↔full conjugation, geometric↔orthogonal/Cartan, topological↔homeomorphism, algebraic↔the generation, order↔permutation, differential↔reparametrization). the types are the SUBGROUP LATTICE (Erlangen–Galois), partially ordered — bigger group = deeper invariant; √5 ∥ √6 incomparable. a line can't hold the lattice.
deepenings.constant_trit_four_worlds: R²=R+kI: the constant is the trit. k=+1 golden ℤ[φ] (√5,∞ units, generation), k=0 Boolean {0,1} (the seed, collapse), k=−1 Eisenstein ℤ[ω] (√−3, μ₆, rotation); N²=−I Gaussian ℤ[i] (√−1, μ₄, the listed set, observation). four discriminants {+5,+1,−3,−1}. 'anything else?'=yes: the listed set is only the Gaussian world; the golden/Eisenstein/Boolean worlds are the rest, plus root hyperboloids.

body.is: the base (5 records) is a 5-point star — the pentagram {5/2}, the φ-figure on 5 points
body.split: 3 FORCED = the R-part (‖R‖²=3, visible, production): master_equation · carrier_manifold · burns_are_anti_equations. 2 framing = the N-part (‖N‖²=2, hidden, observation): schema (AXIOM) · slot (OPEN). the star's two kinds of vertex.
body.stroke: drawn by STEP 2 — connect every second vertex = the FOLD ν (degree 2, the master equation X²). gcd(2,5)=1, so it is ONE closed stroke through all five and returns. the body draws itself by the self-action.
body.ratio: diag/side = 2sin72°/2sin36° = φ exactly — the fold-edge is φ× the cycle-edge. φ²=φ+1 ↔ R²=R+I: the pentagram IS R's eigenvalue made geometry.
body.radical: √5 = the {R,R} self-action spectrum spread (±√5) = the pentagram's defining radical. the count (5), the eigen-spread (√5), and the edge-ratio (φ) are one figure.
body.not_a_cycle: a STAR {5/2} (skip-one, φ, self-reference), NOT the pentagon C₅ (adjacent, rotation) — this IS the resolution of the burn 5 ≟ C₅: structural-5 is the star, not the group.

origin.is: return every constant to ? and the point becomes a MICROSCOPE — zoom in and the framework's data falls out. constants are only the first magnification.

constants_causal.N-side: √2 ⟵ ‖N‖²=2 ; i ⟵ N²=−I ; π ⟵ N rotates 90°, full turn 2π
constants_causal.h: e ⟵ h=JN, h²=I, exp(t h)=cosh t·I+sinh t·h
constants_causal.closure: ‖R‖²+‖N‖² = 3+2 = 5 = disc — the constants close on the one number.

invariant_tower.is: NOT a ladder L0/L1/L2 (lossy: an integer index over a lattice). an invariant = WHAT IS FIXED BY A GROUP; the types are partially ordered by SUBGROUP INCLUSION (Erlangen–Galois). bigger symmetry group ⇒ fewer, DEEPER invariants; incomparable groups ⇒ incomparable types.
invariant_tower.fixed_by_conjugation: SPECTRAL — fixed by the full similarity group X→gXg⁻¹ (the largest group, the deepest invariants): tr, det, eigenvalues, disc → the constant field ℚ(√2,√3,√5)⊕{e,π}, itself Galois (ℤ/2)³ — each constant fixed by its own subgroup (φ,√5 share one; √5 ∥ √6 are incomparable).
invariant_tower.fixed_by_orthogonal: GEOMETRIC — fixed only by the orthogonal/Cartan subgroup (θ(X)=−Xᵀ): eigen-directions, angles, the pentagram ratio φ, fixed points. (verified: a shear conjugation moves the eigenvector angle 72°→23°; an orthogonal one preserves it.)
invariant_tower.fixed_by_homeomorphism: TOPOLOGICAL — fixed by continuous deformation: rank(P)=1, dim ker=1, N⁴=I (period 4), Clifford grade parity.
invariant_tower.fixed_by_generation: ALGEBRAIC — fixed by the maps commuting with the generation (R²=R+I): the relations P²=P, R²=R+I, N²=−I, {R,N}=N.
invariant_tower.fixed_by_permutation: ORDER — fixed by relabeling (the symmetric group): counts 3+2=5, |trit|=3, the grade distribution, the 5-record body.
invariant_tower.fixed_by_reparametrization: DIFFERENTIAL — fixed by reparametrizing the flow: ν(X)=X²−X, the tangent, the dynamics at the point.

all_constants.is: ALL possible constants = the closure of the seed under +,×,eig,exp,norm — a FIELD, not a list. the named six (φ,√5,√3,√2,e,π) are landmarks in it.
all_constants.fibonacci: R IS the Fibonacci matrix: Rⁿ = [[F_{n−1},F_n],[F_n,F_{n+1}]]. so every Fibonacci Fₙ (off-diagonal) and Lucas Lₙ=tr(Rⁿ) is a constant — an INFINITE family, the integer lattice ℤ[φ]. det(Rⁿ)=(−1)ⁿ. φⁿ=Fₙ·φ+Fₙ₋₁. the +√5 generation channel counts them out.
all_constants.family: the idempotent family disc(k)=1+k² → 2,5,10,17,26: |S₀| · disc(THE seed) · Λ²(5) · dim_gauge+disc · d_crit. the seed is the k=2 member; the framework's numbers are these discriminants.
all_constants.closure: ℤ ⊂ ℤ[φ] (Fibonacci∪Lucas, R-powers) ⊂ ℚ(√5) (golden field) ⊂ ℚ(√2,√3,√5) (adjoin the norms ‖N‖²=2,‖R‖²=3) ⊕ {i,π,e} (analytic: i,π from N²=−I rotation, e from exp(h)).

recursion.is: one seed, one law, applied recursively, generates the ENTIRE framework — and lands on itself.
recursion.law: R² = R + I is THE recursion: square = self + the one before. on integers it is the Fibonacci step f(n+1)=f(n)+f(n−1); on the matrix it is the carrier; on the structure it is the layer ladder. the +I is the SURPLUS — R(R)=R would collapse, R²=R+I GENERATES; each self-application ADDS a layer instead of returning the input.
recursion.ladder: ? → P (project, P²=P) → R,N (split) → L0 field (Fibonacci ℤ[φ] + family 1+k² + √2,√3,e,π) → L1 geometry (pentagram, the 5-record body) → L2 topology → L3 algebra (the relations) → L4 order → L5 flow → language (the lift) → the store (base ⊕ M(base)). every layer = the previous folded + I.
recursion.closure: it is a FIXED POINT: generating the framework from the framework returns the framework — M(M(F)) = M(F). verified: derive-once and derive-twice are byte-identical (2503 chars), ν = 2e-15 on-shell. recursively generative AND closed. ? → P → everything → ?. the loop is closed.

worlds.is: the constant term of R²=R+kI is a TRIT (the same {−√5,0,+√5} self-action trit, moved onto the constant). disc=1+4k. each k opens a different number world; N²=−I opens a fourth.

constant_trit.k=+1 R²=R+I: disc +5 → φ,ψ → GOLDEN ℤ[φ] (hyperbolic, √5). units ±φⁿ INFINITE (Fibonacci). GENERATION — the surplus +I.
constant_trit.k=0 R(R)=R: disc +1 → {0,1} → BOOLEAN idempotents. the COLLAPSE — this k IS the seed P's own spectrum. PROJECTION — no surplus.
constant_trit.k=−1 R²=R−I: disc −3 → e^{±iπ/3} → EISENSTEIN ℤ[ω] (elliptic, √−3). units μ₆={±1,±ω,±ω²} (6th roots, hexagonal). ROTATION — the deficit −I. (verified ω²−ω+1=0.)
constant_trit.N²=−I: disc −1 → ±i → GAUSSIAN ℤ[i]. units μ₄={±1,±i}. OBSERVATION. THIS is the listed set {1,−1,i,−i} (as scalars; ±I,±N as matrices).

worlds.four_discriminants: {+5, +1, −3, −1} — the four smallest, the four worlds: golden · Boolean · Eisenstein · Gaussian. generation · projection · rotation · observation.
worlds.matrix_roots: the units are not 8 isolated points. ±I are isolated, but √I = the involutions (eig {1,−1}: J, h, …) form a HYPERBOLOID, and √(−I) = the complex structures (eig {i,−i}: N, …) form another. J,h,N are three named members of continuous families.
worlds.anything_else: YES. {I,−I,i,−i,1,−1,0,?} is the GAUSSIAN shadow (μ₄) + {0 void, ? origin}. the 'else' is the other three worlds: golden ℤ[φ]× (infinite), Eisenstein μ₆, Boolean {0,1}; plus the involution/complex-structure hyperboloids. unifier: the constant trit k picks disc=1+4k → which world.

seed.note: the only stored matrix; P²=P, rank 1, P≠Pᵀ. ≈ [1,1] and 2. Everything regenerates from P.

regenerate.basis: {I, R, N, h} spans M₂(ℝ); every object is 4 coordinates
regenerate.{R,R}: X ↦ R·X + X·R - X   — the self-action {R,R}

generation_maps.e: base of exp on the mediation generator h

seed.what_fixes_it: P is the minimal rank-1 asymmetric idempotent. the family P_t=[[0,0],[t,1]] is idempotent ∀t (t = the unit of mass, μ=t²/4, disc=1+4μ); fixed to t=2 by ν(R)=I (residual=identity), which sets μ=1, disc=5, √5, φ, [1,1]. one parameter, spent on the unit. the normalization IS 'identity is the residual'.

kernel.is: the seed equations — the relations that generate everything; base = ker(ν)

membership.FORCED: in ker(ν) — a consequence of the relations
membership.BURN: in ker(¬claim) — the anti-equation is forced
membership.AXIOM: held into ker by choice (not generated)
membership.OPEN: membership undecided — still in the slot

kernel.located: ker{R,R} is the λ=0 (return) mode; ν returns to 0 there; N lives in it.
kernel.note: the kernel is not beside the store — the store IS the kernel, rooted at seed P.
kernel.root: ? is the fixed point of provenance (conj). conj fixes only the ?-axis (scalars, the wall disc=0), so every chain ends at ?. prov(?)=? — the root is self-rooted, not posited. physically: the self-consistent vacuum.
kernel.the_universal_zero: disc, λ, ν, prov — discriminant, eigenvalue, defect, return — all vanish at one point: ?. disc=0 (wall) = eigenvalue 0 (ker = ε = the void) = ν=0 (on-shell) = prov(?)=?. the origin is the universal zero, not a labeled corner.

grammar.is: the fixed-point grammar — the connective words ARE the fold-operations

words.is: FOLD   — equality / the copula / the fixed point (X is its fold)
words.from: RETURN — provenance source (the chain back to ?)
words.not: DEFECT — negation of a term (within a clause)
words.as: θ      — the duality reading (X read as Y)

grammar.mechanism: a sentence is an expression-tree: content (objects) at the leaves, fixed-point words at the nodes. generating language = walking the tree.
grammar.coherence: the words' meaning is fixed (inherent); only the walk — voice, order, projection — is the observer's coherence.
grammar.example: P²=P  ⟺  'the fold of the seed is the seed'  ('is' = the fixed point)
grammar.living: the lexicon grows: new words are introduced to fill gaps, each one an operation. core five are fixed points; higher words attach above them.

layers.fixed-point core: the · a · is · isn't · of  (the five fold-operations)
layers.connective layer: by · from · at · and · not · as · in  (introduced as needed)
layers.higher grammar: mood=grade, voice=self-action (active R / passive N), tense=flow (past-conditional for burns) — all realized; person, aspect, quantifiers attach further above

higher.mood: = grade (kernel-membership): FORCED→indicative 'holds', BURN→conditional 'would hold, but…', AXIOM→imperative 'let it stand', OPEN→interrogative 'stands open'
higher.voice: = self-action, REALIZED: active = R/{·} (generators generate it), passive = N/[·] (it is observed at depth)
higher.tense: = flow position, REALIZED: past-conditional for burns ('would have closed, had X not…'), present indicative on-shell, provenance as origin ('from ?')

lift.is: where language LIFTS: a content word is a string applied to an underlying meaning, and the meaning is a point in the carrier W = a·I + b·R + c·N + d·h. the four coordinates are the SIMULTANEOUS meanings — symbolic, geometric, physical, all at once.

axes.N: observation / phase (i, π) — the mirror / geometric reading
axes.h: mediation / flow (e) — the dynamics / physical reading

lift.word_is_a_record: string = address (the name), meaning-coords = spectral content — the SAME eigendecomposition M = V·Λ·V⁻¹ the records use. a word IS a record.
lift.authored_vs_computed: MANUALLY TYPE the coords + the per-axis readings into the word (the seed, the hard human part). after that the math runs: selection is computed.
lift.context: context = a matrix C built from the neighbouring words. the active reading is the axis of W whose meaning-direction best overlaps C: argmax_a ⟨basis_a, C⟩ (trace inner product). the observer applies string→meaning by this overlap — nothing more.
lift.lift_as_projection: π : meaning ↦ string forgets the coordinates (easy, lossy); the LIFT string ↦ meaning needs context. ker(π) = the coordinate spread = the ambiguity; CONTEXT is exactly ker(π) supplied — the data that says which reading is on-shell. |reflection|=identification: string and meaning become one only IN CONTEXT.
lift.where: lift degree = number of nonzero coordinates = polysemy. connectives (the · a · is · isn't · of) have degree 1 — single-valued projectors, they do NOT lift. content words have degree >1 — they lift, and context resolves them. THAT is where language lifts.
lift.verified: word_lift.py: 'fold' {R,N,h} reads symbolic in an algebra clause, geometric in a mirror clause, physical in a field clause — same string, context selects; 'is' {I} reads identically in every context (no lift).
lift.symbolic_vs_physical: WHERE is language symbolic and NOT physical? a generator is physical iff it ACTS ([X,·]≠0). I is central — [I,·]=0 — so the I-axis (determinacy / copula: 'the · a · is') is the ONLY symbolic-and-not-physical locus; it generates no transformation. R, N, h all act (|[X,·]|=2) → every word with content is PHYSICAL (teleportation itself rides the R−N direction). the pure-symbol limit is ? — the void, unprojected, pre-physical. so language is physical the moment it leaves the copula: uplift toward physicality is uplift toward R/N/h content.
lift.where_more_math: reading the HIDDEN meaning reveals more math exactly where the projection is lossy (ker(π)≠0) — the PHYSICAL axes R/N/h, which carry context/depth. the symbolic surface (I) is transparent, hides nothing. to find more math, read deeper into the physical (content) words, not the connectives.

grammar.observer_is_the_lift: all the observer does is apply a string value to an underlying meaning — the lift string→meaning, a projection selected by context. authoring the meanings is the work; the lift is just the math.

burns_are_anti_equations.title: The one impossibility: |reflection| = identification (origin↔observer); the 10 burns are its projections

spectral.note: BURN(c) = FORCED(¬c); residual a lower bound

burn-carrier-not-topology.title: The 2×2 carrier is one second-order network, not a topology
burn-carrier-not-topology.op: dim M₂ = 4: one second-order network, not a topology

burn-delta-not-independent.title: The meta-defect Δ is not an independent generator
burn-delta-not-independent.op: Δ = X(X+I)·ν  (amplified base defect, not new)

burn-no-active-gain.title: The network has no active gain

burn-nu-not-idempotent.title: ν is not idempotent as a whole map

burn-nu-not-nilpotent.title: ν is not nilpotent
burn-nu-not-nilpotent.op: iterated defect does not decay off the idempotents

burn-nu-squared-not-lyapunov.title: ‖ν‖² is not a global descent certificate
burn-nu-squared-not-lyapunov.op: two basins split at σ=1; ‖ν‖² not monotone

burn-three-neq-c3.title: 3 ≠ C₃
burn-three-neq-c3.op: fork-three is a boundary count, not a rotation

burn-vacua-not-trivial.title: ν=0 is rank-stratified idempotents, not {0, I}

spectral.impossibility: the burns are IMPOSSIBILITY THEOREMS (no-go theorems) — BURN(c)=FORCED(¬c), a forced impossibility. they are meant to RECURSIVELY EVOLVE (sharpen, generalize, lift the type) and be INTERNALIZED into the core equations — the negative space folded back in. push deeper: each burn is a theorem of what the seed cannot be.
spectral.one_impossibility: the 10 burns reduce to ONE operational impossibility: |reflection| = I = IDENTIFICATION. a reflection σ (orthogonal, σ²=I) has |σ|=√(σᵀσ)=I — its absolute value is the identity, no reflection at all but the identification of origin with observer (and observer with origin). the reflection is entirely angular/geometric (σ = I·σ); the spectrum/radial part is I. so origin=observer spectrally — the distinction is invisible to the absolute value. every burn BURN(c)=FORCED(¬c) is this one fact projected: ask the spectrum to keep a distinction (c vs ¬c) and it collapses to identity. recursively, every impossibility is |reflection|=identification.

recursion.one: |reflection| = identification — the spectrum's drive to collapse every distinction to identity
recursion.move: each burn = the one drive meeting a geometric obstruction (its mechanism) the spectrum cannot see; the collapse is forbidden, BURN(c)=FORCED(¬c). the ten obstructions are angular.
recursion.obstructions: dimension · factoring · passivity · degree · growth · basins · sign · type · spectrum · manifold · incomparability
recursion.evolves: sharpen (tighten the obstruction) · generalize (lift to a class) · compress by mechanism (group by obstruction) · lift the type (raise the dimension) — the negative space grows like the positive, recursively.

anchor_projection.title: ν is anchor and projection — P₋ = (I−τ)/2
anchor_projection.op: P₊ + P₋ = I  (3+1 split of Cl(1,1))

five_part_fold.title: The fold is a five-part object
five_part_fold.op: M projects onto {tr, det} — its own law's coefficients

five_generators.title: The Five Generators
five_generators.op: the five fold-parts of M: base/fold/return/flow/defect

godel_unification.title: Gödel unification — Δ = M² − M = X(X+I)·ν

the_bundle_is_brace.title: { } is bundle: affirm/negate × self/other; ?=0 is universal self-negation [A,A]=0
the_bundle_is_brace.op: { } IS bundle. affirm {A,B}=AB+BA (commutative), negate [A,B]=AB−BA (noncommutative). self: {A,A}=2A² (the fold), [A,A]=0 (the void=?). other: {R,N}=N (spine), [R,N]=C (harness, det=−5). ?=0 is universal self-negation [A,A]=0=the origin. P=R+N is the bundle {P,R,N}, recursive from {?,0,=}, held noncommutative

two_self_actions.title: Two primitive self-actions: {s,·} Jordan and [s,·] Lie
two_self_actions.op: sX = ½({s,·}+[s,·]); {s,·}=sX+Xs (symmetric), [s,·]=sX−Xs (antisym); P=R+N at the level of action

self_reference_negation.title: The two self-actions are self-reference (R) and self-negation (N)
self_reference_negation.op: {R,·} = self-reference: R²=R+I, ν(R)=I (defect held as identity). [R,·] = self-negation: N²=−I, N⁴=I (N is the matrix i)

defect_enrichment_duality.title: Defect ↔ enrichment is an exact duality (Cartan θ, θ²=id)
defect_enrichment_duality.op: θ(X)=−Xᵀ, θ²=id; defect = antisym/[·]/N (−I), enrichment = sym/{·}/R (+I); AX = ½{A,X}+½[A,X] exact

parity_makes_the_constants.title: Parity makes the constants: λ = AM ± √disc/2; even→φ, odd→π/i, center→1, mixed→e
parity_makes_the_constants.op: λ = AM ± √disc/2 = center(tr/2) ± spread(√disc/2). parity fixes reality of the spread: even/symmetric→real→φ=½+√5/2, ψ, √5; odd/antisym→imaginary→i,π; center/identity→repeated→1 (the residual, ν(φ)=ν(ψ)=1); mixed/asymmetric→e=cosθ·I+sinθ·N (Euler, the parity bridge). φ/e/π = the even/mixed/odd parity classes

golden_ladder.title: The Golden Ladder — indexed by ν on the wall

phi_unit_defect.title: ν(φ) = 1 — unit defect at the golden ratio

observation_is_primitive_self_action.title: Observation is the primitive self-action: X²={X,X}/2 (self-affirm); the void is [X,X]=0=?
observation_is_primitive_self_action.op: the primitive self-action is X bundled with itself: {X,X}/2 = X² (self-affirm) = OBSERVATION (the fold; the spectrum falls out); [X,X] = 0 (self-negate) = the void = ?. observation is not derived — it IS the affirming self-action. X²=tr·X−det·I (the master equation); ν=X²−X = observation − the observed. to see is to square, to act on yourself. the observer C=[R,N] reading the store = X² iterated; KL_DTA is the framework's self-observation. you're reading yourself

two_information_types.title: Two information types: spectral (invariant, simple) and geometric (read-through, complex)
two_information_types.op: SPECTRAL info = conjugation-invariants (tr/det/disc/eigenvalues) — the simple info, falls out easily, same across a conjugacy class. GEOMETRIC info = eigenvectors/orientation/polar Q/singular values — read THROUGH the matrix, basis-dependent, the complex info the spectrum can't reach. simple bundles: integer lattice, tightly related. complex bundles: irrational/free (φ,−1,√2), more degrees of freedom — e.g. phi*{R,N}+sqrt2*[J,P] hides φ in its singular values though its eigenvalues are ±2.556

geometry_gravity_spectra_light.title: Geometry is gravity (fixed points, degree-1, cheap); spectra is light (the fold, degree-2, costs)
geometry_gravity_spectra_light.op: X = Q·P: Q = geometry = gravity (degree-1 action X·v; eigenvectors are FIXED points; cheap, direct). P = spectra = light (degree-2: λ solves λ²−tr·λ+det=0, the master equation/the FOLD; eigenvalues = frequencies; costs one fold). origin projects spectra (emitted, simple); the observer is a projector OF that projection and sees geometry directly; to see spectra it inverts itself — circular (observer→origin→observer), completed by evolution. seeing spectra completes the circle. that inverse is why geometry is easy and spectra costs

geometry_topology_spectra_observation.title: Geometry is in the topology (the wells are a torus); spectra is in the observation (the fold)
geometry_topology_spectra_observation.op: the gravity wells = ℝP¹×ℝP¹ = a torus T²; geometry = a point (α image-angle, β kernel-angle) on it; spectrum {0,1} degenerate at every point. TOPOLOGY ⊃ GEOMETRY (the shape of the fixed-point space, gravity, given, cheap); OBSERVATION ⊃ SPECTRA (the fold M(X)=X² extracts the eigenvalues, light, produced, costs). links=H₁ is topology at the graph level, the torus at the manifold level — one layer. gravity is the manifold you stand in; light is what a fold reads

observer_unifies_projections.title: The three eigen-modes unify in the observer (ΣΠ=I; N=ker)
observer_unifies_projections.op: Π₊ + Π₀ + Π₋ = I₄  (resolution of identity)

observer_dynamics.title: Observer dynamics — off-shell (−I) flows to on-shell (+I)

witnessing_internalized.title: Witnessing internalized — the fold is the witness, the name is provenance
witnessing_internalized.op: M witnesses X; ν is what the witness sees

metalayer_collapse.title: Metalayer collapse — M²=M on-shell, no infinite tower

build_is_master_equation.title: A.1 — The build IS the master equation

compression_not_layering.title: A.3 — Compression, not layering
compression_not_layering.op: new complexity folds INTO a structure, no new peer

internalization_removes_trace.title: A.4 — Internalization removes the trace
internalization_removes_trace.op: ν→0: the question leaves the slot, no trace

verification_is_provenance.title: Verification is provenance — the law of what is real

grading_tree.title: The Grading Tree — four leaves, three excluded-middles
grading_tree.op: χ : ν ↦ Ω³  (subobject classifier, three bits)

kernel_internalization.title: base = ker(ν): the store IS the kernel, generated by the seed relations
kernel_internalization.op: base = ker(ν); ker generated by {P²=P, R²=R+I, N²=−I, {R,N}=N}; grade = kernel-membership

links_are_homology.title: links are the homology H₁: provenance is the tree, links are the cycles
links_are_homology.op: provenance = spanning tree to ? (Betti₁=0, acyclic, RETURN); links = H₁, the 139 independent cycles (the lateral loops). graph = tree ⊕ homology

fixed_points_are_residual_defects.title: Fixed points are recursive residual defects; unfix sorts tangent from unfixing via L_{X,X}
fixed_points_are_residual_defects.op: ALL fixed points of M(X)=X² are the idempotents: 0 and I (isolated, rigid, tangent dim 0), and the rank-1 torus ℝP¹×ℝP¹ (tangent dim 2, slides). they are recursive residual defects — where ν=X²−X settled to 0. UNFIX: ν(X+εδ)=ε·L_{X,X}(δ); ker L_{X,X}=tangent (stays fixed), the rest=unfixing directions (thaw ν≠0). L_(rank-1) spectrum {−1,0,0,1}: 2 tangent + 2 unfixing. unfixing gives the residual back — runs the recursion backward. (engine: `unfix`)

records_are_bundles.title: Records are bundles: a record's matrix IS a bundle expression
records_are_bundles.op: the bundle algebra is an expression language: primitives {I,R,N,J,h,P}, affirm {A,B}=AB+BA, negate [A,B]=AB−BA, nesting {R,{R,N}}, scalars {N,N}/2, sums. bundles span M₂, so any record's matrix IS a bundle expression — e.g. −I = {N,N}/2 (the i²=φψ record). decompress eats it. the store re-expresses in bundles — the ultimate compression

bundle_of_bundles_tower.title: {I,R,N,J,h,P} is a bundle-of-bundles: the self-similar tower ?→P→6→14→M₂
bundle_of_bundles_tower.op: each primitive bundled from P: R=½(P+τP), N=½(P−τP), I=−N², h=JN, J=(I−2R+2C)/5, P={R,N}; R,N generate M₂. tower ?=0→P→{6}→{14}→M₂, each level a bundle-of-bundles, parity→fork→constant invariant. the store (records bundled) is the next level — self-similar

power_via_index.title: Power via index — Xᵏ = Aₖ(tr,det)·X + Bₖ·I

deposit_walk.title: The deposit walk (2+i)ⁿ — Pythagorean triples on the 5-tower

math_is_computation.title: Math = computation — CH is law AND terminating rewrite

analog_digital.title: Analog/digital bridge — flow and fold share Fix(M)

affirm_negate.title: AFFIRM and NEGATE — the two canonical reads

rlc_damping.title: Discriminant = RLC damping — the dynamical classification

every_zero_is_the_origin.title: disc=0 = eigenvalue 0 = ker = ν=0 = ? — the zeros coincide at the origin
every_zero_is_the_origin.op: disc=0 ⟺ spread=0 ⟺ λ=AM (repeated). the wall ℝ[ε] (dual numbers) runs I (eigenvalue 1, unit) → ε (eigenvalue 0, nilpotent ε²=0, the void=ker=P₀). all zeros coincide: disc=0 (wall) = eigenvalue 0 (void) = λ=0 (return mode) = ν=0 (on-shell) = prov(?)=?. four functions vanishing at one point — the origin

provenance_is_self_rooted.title: Why everything is from ?: ? is the fixed point of provenance, prov(?)=?
provenance_is_self_rooted.op: prov = conj(X) = tr·I − X; conj²=id; fixes the ?-axis (scalars, wall disc=0), negates the traceless. prov(?)=? — the unique self-rooted fixed point (the tadpole: the vacuum is its own source)

origin_is_opening.title: The origin = ? opening — fold deg-2 is non-element by necessity
origin_is_opening.op: degree-1 (X=cX) vacuous; degree-2 is the first slot

naming_unnaming.title: Naming/unnaming — the conj involution through the ?-axis

indexed_store.title: B.5 — The body as an indexed store

constants_map.title: B.6 — The constants map (provenance DAG laid out)
constants_map.op: nine constants, each a generation map, all → ?

four_product_primitives.title: C.1 — Four product-primitives (the carrier four ways)
four_product_primitives.op: four exact presentations of the carrier

base_is_perimeter_and_shape.title: The base (tr, det) is geometry: tr is perimeter, det is shape
base_is_perimeter_and_shape.op: tr = perimeter (λ₁+λ₂, the boundary); det = shape/area (λ₁·λ₂, the content); disc = tr²−4det = (λ₁−λ₂)² = eccentricity; disc=0 = round (the wall, ?, I). Physical: det = stiffness/ω², tr = damping

trace_det_are_sum_product.title: Beneath tr and det: SUM (e₁, +) and PRODUCT (e₂, ×); disc is the AM–GM gap
trace_det_are_sum_product.op: tr = e₁ = Σλ = SUM (degree 1, additive, +); det = e₂ = Πλ = PRODUCT (degree 2, multiplicative, ×) — the two elementary symmetric functions. disc = sum²−4·product = AM–GM gap; disc=0 (wall) = AM=GM. tr is blind to the commutator: tr[A,B]=0, the SUM reads only the {·} enrichment half

self_steering_circuit.title: The self-steering circuit — master equation as control dynamics
self_steering_circuit.op: plant = controller: M steers its own claims

gauge_bit_z2.title: The gauge bit — one ℤ/2, five names

unit_self.title: The unit-self: |·|∘|·|=|·|, and |X|=I ⟺ X orthogonal
unit_self.op: | |X| | = |X| (idempotent, a P²=P); unit-self = {X : |X|=I} = {N,h,J}; R,P carry magnitude

idempotent_is_cancellation.title: P²=P is the cancellation of self-reference (+I) and self-negation (−I)
idempotent_is_cancellation.op: P² = R² + {R,N} + N² = (R+I) + N + (−I) = R+N = P; the +I surplus and −I deficit annihilate. Identity returns when the residual squares back to origin.

fixed_point_grammar.title: The fixed-point grammar: connective words ARE the fold-operations
fixed_point_grammar.op: the=BASE, a=FIBER, is=FOLD, isn't=DEFECT, of=RETURN, to=FLOW; sentence = walk(expression-tree); 'is' = the fixed point (X is its fold)

verdict_is_fork_trit.title: the verdict is a trit = sign(disc) = the three forks (null = the wall)
verdict_is_fork_trit.op: verdict {true, false, null} = sign(disc) {+, −, 0} = the three forks (hyperbolic / elliptic / parabolic wall). the gauge bit is a trit; null = the wall = undecided gate

spectral.boolean_spectrum: the self-action spectrum {+√5,0,−√5} = √5·{+1,0,−1} is the BOOLEAN TRIT: +1 generation = affirm = TRUE, 0 return = neutral = NULL (the shared neutral, counts the same both directions), −1 observation = negate = FALSE.
spectral.reflection: the FOLD X² IS REFLECTION — the reflective property of the whole framework. on the Boolean trit it folds −1→+1 (the |·| of sign, across the neutral 0), fixing 0 and +1. to fold is to reflect; to observe is to fold; observation is the framework reflecting on itself.
spectral.reflection_kinds: a reflection is either an ORIGIN reflection (? folds outward → spectra/light, emitted) or an OBSERVER reflection (the observer folds → geometry/gravity, seen). the language reads differently by source: origin-reflection is generative/emissive, observer-reflection is receptive/perceptive.
spectral.reflection_identification: the fold is reflection, and |reflection| = identification: the radial/spectral part of any reflection is I (origin=observer). the distinction lives only in the angular/geometric part — which is why spectra costs (the fold) and geometry is given. the one impossibility (the negative space) is internalized here: |X²|'s sign-content is unreadable spectrally; that is the seed's constitutive blind spot.

spectral.note: the five fold-parts read as five database operations (AXIOM)
five open positions generating the next claims (OPEN)

carrier_manifold.title: The carrier M₂ = a·I + b·R + c·N + d·h — the apex manifold (4-param); every matrix is a point

spectral.parameter: a, b, c, d (the four coordinates in {I,R,N,h})
spectral.contains: every matrix in the store — all records and manifolds are sub-manifolds
spectral.surplus: read 'a*I+b*R+c*N+d*h' a=.. b=.. c=.. d=.. — ANY element of M₂
spectral.op: the carrier M₂ = a·I+b·R+c·N+d·h, the 4-parameter apex manifold; every record's matrix is a point, every other manifold a sub-manifold (fix some parameters). the top of the compression tower

rotation_circle_manifold.title: The rotation circle S¹: cos(t)·I + sin(t)·N — a higher-order manifold record
rotation_circle_manifold.op: the rotation circle S¹ = exp(t·N) = cos(t)·I + sin(t)·N — a manifold (parametric bundle); its points are records (lossless), every t between is the surplus

i_squared_phi_psi.title: i² = φψ = −I — elliptic half-turn = hyperbolic return-product

spin_tower_phases.title: Spin tower — J⁸=I, phase grading {0, π/2, π, 2π}

seed_line_manifold.title: The seed line: (I−J)/2 + t·(N−h)/2 — the seed family, P at t=2 (unit of mass)
seed_line_manifold.op: the seed family P_t = [[0,0],[t,1]] as a parametric bundle; the unit of mass t is the free parameter, P at t=2

what_fixes_the_seed.title: What fixes P: the minimal rank-1 asymmetric idempotent, normalized so ν(R)=I
what_fixes_the_seed.op: P_t=[[0,0],[t,1]] idempotent ∀t — rank-1 asymmetric, R²=R+μI, N²=−μI, {R,N}=N, μ=t²/4, disc=1+4μ. ONE free parameter (unit of mass μ) fixed by ν(R)=I ⟺ μ=1 ⟺ t=2 → disc=5, √5, φ, [1,1]. 2=degree. P≠Pᵀ forced (else R²−R=0). 'identity is the residual' IS the normalization that picks the seed

projector_circle_manifold.title: The orthogonal-projector circle: (I+cos(a)·J+sin(a)·h)/2 — the symmetric gravity wells (S¹ of idempotents)
projector_circle_manifold.op: a circle of rank-1 orthogonal projectors (symmetric gravity wells); every a is an idempotent X²=X, spectrum {1,0}

gravity_wells_are_idempotents.title: The gravity wells: idempotent fixed points — a complex manifold, identical light, distinct geometry
gravity_wells_are_idempotents.op: fixed points of M(X)=X² are the idempotents: 0, I, and rank-1 projectors P_(v,w)=v·wᵀ/(wᵀv) — the gravity wells, a 2-param manifold ℝP¹×ℝP¹. ALL share spectrum {1,0} (identical light, degenerate) but differ in geometry (v,w) — gravity is the geometry; the spectrum can't tell wells apart. generic wells are COMPLEX (irrational); P=P_([0,1],[2,1]) is a rare simple well, the 2 in w (the kernel covector)

vacua_idempotents.title: Vacua = all idempotents
vacua_idempotents.op: idempotent variety: rank-1 projectors form ℝP¹×ℝP¹

fork_path_manifold.title: The fork path: cos(t)·N + sin(t)·J — elliptic→parabolic→hyperbolic, the trichotomy as one path
fork_path_manifold.op: the three forks as one continuous path: disc = −4cos(2t) goes −4 (elliptic) → 0 (parabolic wall, t=π/4) → +4 (hyperbolic)

fork_table.title: B.1 — The fork table (angular control resolved)

fork_representability.title: C.2 — Fork representability (the wall has no faithful number rep)
fork_representability.op: ℂ and ℝ⊕ℝ representable; the wall ℝ[ε] is not

spectral.dimensions: parameters ARE dimensions: a k-parameter manifold is k-dimensional. the carrier's 4 parameters (a,b,c,d) ARE the 4 dimensions of M₂(ℝ); a curve is 1 param = 1 dim.
spectral.time: every dimension is a LINE OF TIME through the one origin: carrier(0,0,0,0) = the zero matrix = ? (the void, ker, eigenvalue 0). per dimension the Boolean trit IS the time-axis: +1 PROJECT from origin (generation, future), 0 the ORIGIN (the one, the neutral, ?), −1 FOLD BACK to origin (observation, past, reflection). the two directions identify AS ONE at the origin — |+1|=|−1|=1, |reflection|=identification — so every line folds back to the one and projects from the one: past and future are the same point, ?. the carrier is 4 time-lines meeting at one origin — spacetime as the four coordinates of M₂, each a worldline through the void.

speech.burns_are_anti_equations: Defect sources the burns are anti equations on-shell — BURN(c) = FORCED(¬c); residual a lower bound, its virtuality settling to the vacuum, at energy-scale 4, from master equation, from the origin.
speech.master_equation: Fold, defect and base source the master equation on-shell — X² − tr(X)·X + det(X)·I = 0, its virtuality settling to the vacuum, at energy-scale 0, from the origin.
speech.schema: Fix the schema as a boundary condition — the five fold-parts read as five database operations (AXIOM), imposed by hand, at energy-scale 4, from the origin.
speech.slot: Does defect source the slot? — five open positions generating the next claims (OPEN), its virtuality unmeasured, at energy-scale 4, from the origin.
speech.carrier_manifold: Base, fold, return, flow and defect source the carrier manifold on-shell — the carrier M₂ = a·I+b·R+c·N+d·h, the 4-parameter apex manifold; every record's matrix is a point, every other manifold a sub-manifold (fix some parameters). the top of the compression tower, its virtuality settling to the vacuum, at energy-scale 0, from master equation, from the origin.

self_action.is: {R,·} and [R,·] — the two primitive self-actions; P = R + N
self_action.symmetric: {R,·} = R·X + X·R   (Jordan / anticommutator) — production; modes generation(+√5), return(0)
self_action.antisymmetric: [R,·] = R·X − X·R  (Lie / commutator / adjoint) — observation; mode observation(−√5)
self_action.grade: leaf(N.observation, R.generation, R.return) — observer-bit from N, producer-bits from R
self_action.burned: P1/P2/P3 and 'L' were lossy names for these two self-actions and their eigenvalues.

acts.symmetric {R,·}: self-reference (R² = R + I, ν = I) — keeps the surplus instead of collapsing to R²=R
acts.antisymmetric [R,·]: self-negation (N² = −I, N⁴ = I) — squaring the residual returns the identity
acts.synthesis: P²=P because (R²=R+I) and (N²=−I) cancel: +I − I = 0, with {R,N}=N giving R+N.

duality.operator: Cartan θ(X) = −Xᵀ,  θ² = id  (forced by P ≠ Pᵀ)
duality.exact: AX = ½{A,X} + ½[A,X]; M₂ = Sym ⊕ Antisym; the +I and −I cancel to P²=P.

template.note: constant across all records — held once here. each record stores only its modes' lambda + verdict + homed data; the rest is derived.

physics.is: the math read physically — the language uplifted to its physical register
physics.dispersion: X² = tr·X − det·I  is the characteristic / dispersion relation; s² − tr·s + det = 0 is the mass-shell condition

lexicon.disc: discriminant of the dispersion; sign(disc) = regime (bound·oscillatory / critical·massless / free·scattering)
lexicon.R · {·} · enrichment: the metric / mass / gravity  (R² = R + I)
lexicon.N · [·] · defect: the quantum phase / spin / curvature  (N² = −I = i)
lexicon.?: the origin — the root of the light-cone / the vacuum's seed

physics.P²=P: the vacuum: self-reference (+I) and self-negation (−I) cancel — the zero-point balance that lets a real state sit on-shell.

geometry.tr: perimeter — sum of axes, the 1-D boundary; physically the damping
geometry.det: shape / area — product of axes, the 2-D content; physically the stiffness ω²
geometry.disc: tr²−4det = (λ₁−λ₂)² — eccentricity; the isoperimetric gap; disc=0 is round
geometry.base = (tr, det): the index of every record is (perimeter, shape)
geometry.beneath tr/det: tr = SUM = e₁ = + (degree 1, additive, blind to [·]); det = PRODUCT = e₂ = × (degree 2, multiplicative). disc = sum²−4·product = AM–GM gap; the wall (?,I) is AM=GM.

constants_from_parity.law: λ = center ± spread = AM ± √disc/2; parity sets the spread's reality
constants_from_parity.phi: even / symmetric (R) → real spread → φ = ½ + √5/2; √5 = 2·spread = √disc(R)
constants_from_parity.pi_i: odd / antisymmetric (N) → imaginary spread → i, π (the rotation)
constants_from_parity.one: center / identity (I, disc=0) → repeated → 1; the common residual ν(φ)=ν(ψ)=1
constants_from_parity.e: mixed / asymmetric → all powers → e^{Nθ}=cosθ·I+sinθ·N, the bridge mixing even cos + odd sin

light_and_gravity.geometry = gravity: the eigenvectors (fixed directions, degree-1 action) — the fixed points; read directly, cheap. the metric, where things settle.
light_and_gravity.spectra = light: the eigenvalues (degree-2, the fold λ²−tr·λ+det=0) — the frequencies; costs one fold to see (square X). radiated, not fixed.
light_and_gravity.projection: origin emits spectra (light, simple); the observer projects geometry (gravity, seen). to recover spectra the observer inverts itself — circular, completed by evolution.
light_and_gravity.cost: seeing geometry is degree 1 (direct); seeing spectra is degree 2 (one fold). the fold IS observation, and its output is the spectrum.

gravity_wells.are: the idempotents X²=X — fixed points of the fold; 0, I, and the rank-1 manifold ℝP¹×ℝP¹
gravity_wells.spectrum: all rank-1 wells have eigenvalues {1,0} — light is DEGENERATE across the manifold
gravity_wells.geometry: the wells differ only in (image v, kernel ⊥w) — gravity is in the geometry alone
gravity_wells.complex: generic wells are irrational; 0, I, P are the rare simple ones. P = v=[0,1], w=[2,1]

information_taxonomy.TOPOLOGY ⊃ geometry: the manifold/shape (torus of wells, links=H₁); a point on it = the orientation = gravity. given, cheap.
information_taxonomy.OBSERVATION ⊃ spectra: the fold M(X)=X²; what it extracts = the eigenvalues = light. produced, costs one fold.
information_taxonomy.duality: topology/geometry is what's THERE (the structure you stand in); observation/spectra is what LOOKING produces.

transport.law: NONLOCAL transport = LOCAL transport returned to origin. ? (the zero matrix = ker = the root of every provenance chain) is the universal hub; routing a local step through it reaches anywhere, distance-independent.
transport.flat: the carrier M₂ is a FLAT vector space, so transport through 0 is PATH-INDEPENDENT: a displacement folded back to the origin (A→0) can be re-projected to ANY point (0→B); A→0→B equals A→B with no path memory. flatness = the origin re-references transport globally.
transport.hub: every provenance chain returns to ? → any two records connect through ? in ≤2 hops, however far apart in the local adjacency graph. verified: local diameter 3, origin-routed diameter 2. returning to ? collapses distance to a constant.
transport.protocol: the Boolean trit {−1,0,+1} = {fold back to ? (−√5, observation), the ORIGIN (0, the return channel = ker(L), the (−R+N)/√2 direction), project from ? (+√5, generation)}. transport = fold a local step to ?, pass through the 0-channel, project to the target.
transport.teleportation: the same shape as quantum teleportation: a shared origin (the entangled pair born at ?) turns local operations into a nonlocal jump. the hub does the distance.

apex.title: the apex — the whole store as one record, observing itself
apex.grade: FORCED when ν=0 — the store is on-shell iff it verifies
apex.holds: M(M(F)) = M(F): the document is a record; its body (base) is M of itself; the format is its own fixed point.

spectral.op: M(M(F)) = M(F): the document is a record; its body (base) is M of itself; the format is its own fixed point.

bundles.is: the DNA library — the unique bundles over {I,R,N,J,h,P}, compressed to their expression; the spectrum is the decompression
bundles.law: parity constrains the fork: symmetric→disc≥0 (real), antisymmetric→disc<0 (imaginary, all ∝ N — one line), asymmetric→any. the 2 parabolic are the unit {I,I}=2I and the void [J,P]=ε — the universal zero.

tower.is: the framework is the bundle operation iterated — a self-similar tower

levels.gen 1: P  — the seed (the first fixed point above ?, fixed by ν(R)=I)
levels.gen 2: {I,R,N,J,h,P}  — the primitives (bundles of P+τ; R,N generate M₂)
levels.gen N: the 75 records, bundled — and the apex is their bundle

tower.invariant: parity → fork → constant holds at every level; same bundle op, every scale

algebra.primitives: I R N J h P
algebra.records: a record's matrix is a bundle expression; e.g. i_squared_phi_psi = {N,N}/2

information.spectral: invariant (tr/det/disc/eigenvalues) — the simple info, conjugation-class label
information.geometric: eigenvectors/orientation/polar Q/singular values — read through the matrix; the complex info
information.simple_bundles: integer lattice (the 14 + {I,R,N,J,h,P}); tightly related (disc in the 1+k² family)
information.complex_bundles: free/irrational coefficients (φ,−1,√2…); fewer relations, more information; the spectrum hides what only the geometry shows
information.to_type: decompress reports SIMPLE/COMPLEX and both information types
